arts.ttl: France XI vs Croatia – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: France face Croatia in the first leg of their UEFA Nations League quarter-final in Split this evening. Les Bleus topped League A Group 2 after a final-fixture win in Italy took the French above their beaten opposition on head-to-head record.
